Say conditional statement, ya tatawagen met ya "if-else statement," et sakey a programming construct ya mangiiter na pankanawnawa ed sakey a programa ya manggawa na nanduruman kiwas depende no tua o aliwan tua so sakey a kondisyon. Say manunan istruktura na sakey a kondisyonal a balikas et mangilaktip ed sakey a kondisyon na test (kaslakan, sakey a balikas ya man-evaluate ed tua odino aliwa), ya tumbokan na sakey odino masulok nin balikas ya gawaen no say kondisyon na test et tua, tan posiblin sananey nin set na balikas ya gawaen no say kondisyon na test et aliwan tua.

Diad maslak a programming language, saray conditional statement et singa "if" statement, ya nayarin tumbokan na sakey odino masulok nin "else if" statement tan "else" statement. Singa bilang, nia so simplin kondisyonal a balikas ed Python:

```
no x > 10:
    print("say x et babaleg nen say 10")
elif x > 0:
    print("positibo so x balet ag onlampas ed 10")
arum:
    print("say x et aliwan positibo")
```

Diad sayan alimbawa, no say balor na `x` et mas baleg nen say 10, say unonan balikas so gawaen, tan say programa et mangi-print na "x et mas baleg nen say 10". No say `x` et aliwan mas baleg nen say 10 balet ta positibo nin siansia, say komaduan balikas so gawaen, tan say programa et mangi-print na "say x et positibo balet ag mas baleg nen say 10." No anggapo ed sarayan kondisyon so nasumpal – salanti, no say `x` et abeba o mipara ed 0 – say pinal ya "else" ya balikas so nagawa, tan say programa et mangi-print na "say x et aliwan positibo."

Saray conditional statement et mabiskeg ya kagawaan, ya mangiiter na pankanawnawa ed saray programmer ya manggawa na komplikado tan naadapta iran programa ya makaebat ed nanduruman input tan situasyon.
